name: Yogurt Based Sauces (Mf)
recipeIngredient: nickel size round of fresh ginger
1/4 cup puree of roasted red peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small food processor, make a puree of the herbs, ginger and jalapeno pepper.
2. Mix this puree into the yogurt.
3. Add the scallion and cumin.
4. Season the sauce with salt and pepper.
5. Blend in any optional ingredients chosen (grated seeded cucumbers, diced tomatoes, or roasted red peppers puree).
6. Serve very cold; great against hot steak.
Yield: about 3 cups
